sections.paragraph:
- Original: προσδοκία

- Transliteration: Prosdokia

- Phonetic: pros-dok-ee'-ah

- Definition:

1. expectation (whether good or evil)

- Origin: from G4328

- TDNT entry: 18:05,9

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: From G4328; apprehension (of evil); by implication infliction anticipated: - expectation looking after.
